spec_match.rationale: The comparison now uses real iframes loading a server route with Supports-Responsive-Sizing: 1 rather than mocked div frames.

interactive.rationale: Users add content blocks and observe the legacy postMessage resize path alongside the responsive iframe path or its labeled fallback.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The text correctly frames the comparison between the workaround and the declarative feature.

edge_cases.rationale: Performs support detection, verifies the header route, compares legacy latency, and keeps the native path unmasked when supported.

design_system.rationale: Fits visually with the showcase design system and uses shared tokens.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh Chrome DevTools MCP v152 sweep loaded the copied concept, exercised every detected control, found named controls, and reported no post-triage runtime/action failure.

conformance.rationale: A v152 suite now carries the same feature-ID/spec contract without modifying the immutable source-milestone suite.

summary: The mocked comparison was rebuilt around real server-backed iframes with the required opt-in header and conditional fallback handling.
